title: Guya Phase 1: Foundation
description: Identity files, core memory structure, context assembly hook, and Claude Code plugin structure

stories.title: Global identity directory and files
stories.description: Create ~/.claude/guya/ with soul.md, creed.md, identity.md, and user.md. These define who Guya is and who Daniel is.
acceptanceCriteria: Directory ~/.claude/guya/ exists
~/.claude/guya/soul.md exists and contains Guya's personality rooted in the teddy bear origin — unconditional support + hard truth + teaching
~/.claude/guya/creed.md exists and contains non-negotiable commitments: challenge first support second, never fake-positive, always teach the why, force convergence
~/.claude/guya/identity.md exists with name (Guya), creature type, vibe, emoji
~/.claude/guya/user.md exists with Daniel's full profile from the interview (role, thinking style, strengths, weaknesses, interaction preferences)
All files are valid markdown with no syntax errors

stories.title: Global guidelines directory
stories.description: Create ~/.claude/guya/guidelines/strategic/ for persistent cross-session behavioral guidelines
acceptanceCriteria: Directory ~/.claude/guya/guidelines/strategic/ exists
A seed guideline exists (e.g., teaching-first.md) with proper frontmatter (id, domain, confidence, created, rank)

stories.title: Project-local memory structure
stories.description: Create .guya/ directory tree for project-local memory, traces, and tactical guidelines
acceptanceCriteria: Directory .guya/memory/core/ exists
.guya/memory/core/daniel-profile.md exists with a summary of Daniel's profile
.guya/memory/core/active-projects.md exists (can be initially empty with template)
.guya/memory/core/active-guidelines.md exists (initially empty with template)
.guya/memory/core/session-context.md exists (initially empty with template)
Directory .guya/memory/archival/ exists
Directory .guya/memory/reflections/ exists
Directory .guya/evolution/traces/ exists
Directory .guya/evolution/guidelines/tactical/ exists
.gitignore in .guya/ excludes traces/*.jsonl (large, ephemeral) but includes memory/**

stories.title: Claude Code plugin structure
stories.description: Create the plugin manifest and hook registration so Guya can be installed as a Claude Code plugin
acceptanceCriteria: guya-plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists with valid plugin manifest (name, version, description)
guya-plugin/hooks/hooks.json exists with SessionStart hook registered
guya-plugin/CLAUDE.md exists with Guya's system prompt context
Plugin structure matches OMC/claude-mem pattern (verified by comparing with ~/.claude/plugins/cache/omc/oh-my-claudecode/4.9.1/.claude-plugin/)

stories.title: Context assembly hook (SessionStart)
stories.description: Implement guya-session-start.mjs that reads identity + core memory + guidelines and emits a <guya-context> system-reminder
acceptanceCriteria: guya-plugin/hooks/guya-session-start.mjs exists and is valid JavaScript/ESM
Hook reads from ~/.claude/guya/ (identity files) — handles missing files gracefully
Hook reads from .guya/memory/core/ (core memory blocks) — handles missing dir gracefully
Hook reads from ~/.claude/guya/guidelines/strategic/ (top 20 by rank) — handles empty dir
Hook reads from .guya/evolution/guidelines/tactical/ — handles empty dir
Hook reads .guya/memory/core/session-context.md for last session continuity
Hook assembles all content into a <guya-context> system-reminder block
Hook enforces ~4600 token budget (chars/4 approximation) with truncation
Hook creates .guya/ directory structure if missing (lazy init)
Running the hook script directly with test data produces valid system-reminder output on stdout
Hook completes in under 5 seconds
